section_name: Duties Following Collision Involving Automated Motor Vehicle
text: In the event of a collision involving an automated motor vehicle, the automated motor vehicle or any human operator of the automated motor vehicle shall comply with Chapter 550 (Collisions and Collision Reports) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.455 — Duties Following Collision Involving Automated Motor Vehicle

In the event of a collision involving an automated motor vehicle, the automated motor vehicle or any human operator of the automated motor vehicle shall comply with Chapter 550 (Collisions and Collision Reports) .

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 38, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.text: In the event of a collision involving an automated motor vehicle, the automated motor vehicle or any human operator of the automated motor vehicle shall comply with Chapter 550 (Collisions and Collision Reports) .
